name_en: Olive hand-rubbed leather with gold buckle·Accordion bag 22cm
name_cn:
Olive hand-rubbed leather with gold buckle·Accordion bag 22cm
The most elegant Sac de Day series, a timeless classic. Exquisite pencil-stitched calfskin with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer! The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the understated luxury style~
Model: 717440
Dimensions: 22x18x10.5cm
